note: Curated itineraries mirrored from trlibrary.com/visit/itineraries. band: day | weekend | week | epic. Used to suggest a starting route based on days + origin.

itineraries.title: One Day at the Library
itineraries.blurb: Painted Canyon on the way in, a morning in the Library, the South Unit loop, and dinner in town.

itineraries.title: TR's Badlands
itineraries.blurb: The places that made him: Painted Canyon, the Maltese Cross cabin, and the Elkhorn Ranch site. One day, or two with the Elkhorn.

itineraries.title: Weekend Drives to Medora
itineraries.blurb: Long-weekend routes from Bismarck, Fargo, Minneapolis and Winnipeg — each with what to see on the way.

itineraries.title: 2 Nights, 3 Days in Medora
itineraries.blurb: See Medora properly: Painted Canyon, the South Unit loop, the Cowboy Hall of Fame, and the Medora Musical.

itineraries.title: The Conservation Trip
itineraries.blurb: The Badlands to Devils Tower, the first national monument, and Wind Cave, which TR made a national park in 1903.

itineraries.title: Sturgis to Medora
itineraries.blurb: US-85 — the Theodore Roosevelt Expressway — runs 224 miles north from Sturgis to Medora. Two days, or three with the North Unit.

itineraries.title: The Enchanted Highway
itineraries.blurb: Thirty-two miles of giant scrap-metal sculpture south from I-94 to Regent. The easiest half-day detour on the Bismarck–Medora corridor.

itineraries.title: 4-Day North Dakota Road Trip
itineraries.blurb: From the state capital to the Badlands: Bismarck riverfront, the Heritage Center, Scandinavian Heritage Park, and the National Park.

itineraries.title: Deep Time
itineraries.blurb: Fossils and deep time for families — petrified forest at Medora, dinosaurs at Dickinson, a mummified Edmontosaurus in Bismarck.

itineraries.title: The Black Hills Loop
itineraries.blurb: Spearfish Canyon, Deadwood, Custer State Park, Wind Cave and Devils Tower. About 800 miles out of Medora and back.

itineraries.title: The River Road
itineraries.blurb: Follow Lewis and Clark and the Missouri: Fort Abraham Lincoln, Knife River villages, Lake Sakakawea, then south to the Library.

itineraries.title: 7-Day Billings to Bismarck
itineraries.blurb: Four national parks and a string of Western towns: Yellowstone, the Beartooth, Cody, Deadwood, Devils Tower and Mount Rushmore.

itineraries.title: 7-Day Bismarck to Rapid City
itineraries.blurb: Five national parks, a Pitchfork Steak Fondue, and the Presidential Library on day two.

itineraries.title: Five Presidents
itineraries.blurb: Roughly 2,600 miles linking this Library with Eisenhower, Truman, Lincoln and Hoover.

itineraries.title: North on 29
itineraries.blurb: Up the I-29 corridor from Kansas City or Omaha — Falls Park, the Corn Palace, Dignity, then west to the Badlands.

itineraries.title: Roosevelt Triangle
itineraries.blurb: TR's legacy across the Great American West — the Badlands of North and South Dakota and Wyoming. A seven-page guide.

itineraries.title: Chicago to the Badlands
itineraries.blurb: Seven to nine days on I-90/I-94: the Driftless Area, across Minnesota and North Dakota, with an optional Black Hills loop home.

itineraries.title: 10-Day Denver to Salt Lake City
itineraries.blurb: Black Hills, the Badlands, Yellowstone and the Tetons. Mount Rushmore, Deadwood, Devils Tower and five national parks.

itineraries.title: Seattle to the Badlands
itineraries.blurb: Ten to twelve days across the northern tier: the Hoh Rain Forest, over the Cascades, through Glacier, into the Badlands.

itineraries.title: 13-Day Denver to Jackson Hole
itineraries.blurb: Black Hills to the Badlands and across Yellowstone to the Tetons. Old Faithful, a Snake River float, covered-wagon cookouts.
